Class BDD

java.lang.Object
jdd.bdd.NodeTable
jdd.bdd.BDD
Direct Known Subclasses:
Adder, BDDQueens, BDDUniverse, DebugBDD, ProfiledBDD, ProfiledBDD2
public class BDD extends NodeTable

    • registerGCPrehook

      public void registerGCPrehook(BDD.GCPrehook prehook)
      Register a prehook to be called before JDD GC. This allows NDD to perform its GC before JDD GC.
      Parameters:
      prehook - The prehook callback to register.
